segments.text: Hear my cry, O God; attend unto my prayer.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: From the end of the earth will I cry unto thee, when my heart is overwhelmed: lead me to the rock that is higher than I.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For thou hast been a shelter for me, and a strong tower from the enemy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will abide in thy tabernacle for ever: I will trust in the covert of thy wings.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For thou, O God, hast heard my vows: thou hast given me the heritage of those that fear thy name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Thou wilt prolong the king's life: and his years as many generations.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: Thou shalt add days to the days of the king

segments.text: He shall abide before God for ever: O prepare mercy and truth, which may preserve him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: So will I sing praise unto thy name for ever, that I may daily perform my vows.
segments.speaker: David
